The UG program has been accredited by the NBA successfully four times.The department comprises 34 experienced faculty members, of whom 27 hold Ph.D. degrees.The department’s laboratories are equipped with state-of-the-art software and advanced machinery, ensuring that students stay abreast of technological advancements and are well-prepared for excellent placements and lifelong learning. The department actively collaborates with several national organizations to promote training, student internships, projects, and research and development activities. In 2017, the Siemens Centre of Excellence was established in partnership with SIEMENS and APSSDC, providing industry-relevant training to students. Additionally, the 3D Experience Centre was launched in 2018 through collaboration between APSSDC and Dassault Systems, furthering the department’s mission to prepare students for the industry. Faculty and students also actively participate in professional societies of national importance such as ASME, IE, and SAE. Mechanical Engineering students have secured placements in a variety of national and multinational companies, including Cognizant, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Accenture, Hyundai Motors, Ashok Leyland, L&T, JSW Group, Reliance Industries, KCP Limited, VEE Technologies, RAAM Group, Jasper Industries, and others. The department has strong Alumni spreading across the globe in different MNCs and many started their own enterprises. The department maintains active research groups focused on academic, collaborative, and sponsored research in areas such as characterization of metal matrix and natural fiber composites, alternative fuels, finite element analysis of fiber composite systems, machine condition monitoring, and tribology. Faculty and students of the department published 558 research articles in peer reviewed and Scopus, SCI journals and 358 articles in Conferences with 3035 citations. It has received significant research funding exceeding INR 2 crores from national agencies such as AICTE, DST, UGC, and DRDO labs. The department is recognized as a research center by JNTUK, Kakinada. To date, the department has published 11 patents and filed 3 patent applications. Vision To provide transformative education that equips students with strong fundamentals in mechanical engineering, problem-solving abilities, communication, and leadership skills to meet global engineering challenges. To promote innovation and research by cultivating a collaborative environment that encourages creativity, entrepreneurship, and lifelong learning in emerging areas of engineering. To strengthen industry–institute interaction through partnerships with industries, research organizations, and global institutions for practical exposure, consultancy, and technology transfer. To contribute to society and nation-building by developing competent and ethical mechanical engineers committed to sustainable and inclusive growth. Mission Dr. N. Ravi Kumar Professor & Head Welcome Message Welcome to Mechanical Engineering Department, SAHE. I am elated to inform you that the Department of Mechanical Engineering is built on the strengths of a highly qualified, experienced, and dedicated faculty, supported by state-of-the-art software and hardware to fulfil curricular requirements. The Department has established strong collaborations with prominent industries, research organizations, and reputed institutes to foster a high-quality academic environment that blends intellectual rigor with cross-disciplinary breadth, all within a well-organized and student-centred setting. Additionally, a research center and modern laboratories equipped with advanced instruments are available to support cutting-edge research activities. The Department also emphasizes innovation and entrepreneurship by establishing student technical clubs that work closely with the Institute Innovation Council and the Entrepreneurship Development Cell. With a team of highly qualified and experienced professors, the faculty offers a dynamic curriculum that blends theoretical knowledge with practical application, preparing students to tackle real- world engineering challenges. State-of-the-art laboratories, research centers, and industry collaborations in areas such as robotics, thermal engineering, manufacturing, and automotive design. The faculty fosters a learning environment that encourages creativity, critical thinking, and problem-solving, equipping graduates with the skills needed for successful careers in both academia and industry.
